/usr/bin/ar qc libocuduvec.a CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/accumulate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/add.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/bit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/clip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/compare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/conversion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/convolution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/division.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/dot_prod.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/modulus_square.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/prod.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/sc_prod.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/subtract.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocuduvec.dir/unwrap.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocuduvec.a
